value: JSONL append at ~/.codexcli/telemetry.jsonl. Tracks tool, session, op type, namespace, source (mcp/cli), scope, agent (CODEX_AGENT_NAME). Enriched with duration, hit/miss, redundant, responseSize. responseSize semantic: bytes returned to caller — for MCP, the response payload via extractResponseText(); for CLI, the actual stdout output captured via the responseMeasure state machine in withCliInstrumentation (src/utils/responseMeasure.ts). Both unified in v1.11.x — pre-fix CLI reads silently logged responseSize: undefined and CLI writes used the after-value size, neither of which matched the MCP semantic. Session ID is shared with audit via src/utils/session.ts. codex_stats computes: delivery floor (bytes/4), exploration estimate (namespace-weighted multipliers for tool calls avoided), redundant write savings, per-namespace breakdown, trending metrics, and per-agent breakdowns. EXPLORATION_COST map exported from telemetry.ts for transparency.
